audience: user asking whether SQL text or DataFrame-style APIs have production support
blocked_explanation: SQL parse/bind/plan/execute and broad DataFrame runtime support require future admitted runtime slices with correctness, evidence, and no-fallback proof.
claim_boundary: SQL/DataFrame readiness is inspectable but runtime execution is not broadly supported or production-claimable.
expected_output_evidence: A capability posture report showing report_only or unsupported rows rather than runtime execution.
title: SQL and DataFrame capability posture
